positive: A stylized celestial forest scene, featuring geometrically precise trees and ethereal bioluminescent flora, rendered in a minimalist yet highly detailed graphic style. The primary composition is a central grouping of abstract, crystalline mountain peaks transitioning into a glowing nebula sky. Use a color palette of deep indigo, vibrant teal, gold leaf accents, and stark white highlights. Emphasize strong, clean silhouettes against a dramatic, high-contrast background. Style should be a blend of Art Nouveau poster art and modern vector illustration, highly optimized for screen printing or apparel fabric direct-to-garment printing. Full circle composition, centered focus, volumetric light rays piercing through the canopy.
negative: blur, deformed, low resolution, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cropped, muddy colors, sketch, photorealism, messy, grain
